docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, LEAH HEARING SET FOR NOV-15-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-19-07 BY COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK-BETH WILBER, NOTHING ON RECORD. (506)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY RODRIGUEZ, LEAH SET FOR NOV-15-2007 IS CONTINUED TO JAN-24-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN 506. PER STIPULATION OF PARTIES. COMM PAUL SLAVIT; F. RAYRAY, CLERK. NOT REPORTED IN (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY PENA, MARCOS AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, LEAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, LEAH
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-30-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-19-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 9/19/07 AT 10:00 A.M. TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENA, MARCOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, LEAH $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,595.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY RODRIGUEZ, LEAH IS GRANTED AT THE REQUEST OF THE PARTIES. DISMISSED AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF WITHOUT PREJUDICE. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
